!Energy loss rates of electrons, parameter < 0 if electrons lose energy, rate in [eV cm-3 s-1],
!tot - total rate, 
!rot      - H2 rotational excitation, only transitions with the same vibrational quantum nb,
!rot_pos  - H2 rotational excitation, electrons gain energy,
!vibr     - H2 ro-vibrational excitation (within the ground electronic state, including pure rotational transitions),
!vibr01   - H2 ro-vibrational excitation v = 0 -> 1 (within the ground electronic state),
!vibr_pos - H2 ro-vibrational excitation, electrons gain energy
!elec_s - H2 electronic states excitation (singlet),
!elec_t - H2 electronic states excitation (triplet),
!ion - molecule/atom ionization,
!hei - HeI excitation by electron impact
!mt - momentum transfer, 
!ecoul - Coulomb loses on electrons,
!ncoll - neutral heating rate due to collisions H2-H2, H2-He,
!ndiss - neutral heating rate due to H2 dissociation (two-step dissociation, triplet excitation), > 0
!H nuclei concentration [cm-3], nb of times,
! 2.000e+04      151    
!time(s)    tot         rot         rot_pos     vibr        vibr01      vibr_pos    elec_s      elec_t      ion         hei         mt          ecoul       ncoll       ndiss
